name: Carrot & Raisin Muffins 1
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Cream of Wheat (quick cooking rolled oats)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, Cream of Wheat, baking powder, and salt.
2. Stir in the grated carrots, dried raisins, and cinnamon.
3. In another bowl, beat the egg, milk, and oil until well combined.
4. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and pour in the liquid mixture.
5. Mix lightly until just combined.
6. Carefully fill greased muffin pans about 3/4 full with the batter.
7. Bake at 375°F for 15-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
